mapper.select: select t.statistics_time as alarmtime, t.exception_message as alarmcontent, t.name as tableNameCh, t.table_name_en as tableNameEn, t.sjxjbm as tableId, t.alarm_level as levelName from table_organization_assets t where t.statistics_time >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') and t.statistics_time < DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and t.table_state = '异常' and t.name is not null
